<!-- seeded-by-willverse-pipeline: remove this line to stop pipeline updates -->
__NOTOC__
<div class="wv-hero">
<div class="wv-hero-title">The Willverse Wiki</div>
<div class="wv-hero-tag">A spoiler-safe, source-grounded encyclopedia for Will Wight's connected universe</div>
<div class="wv-hero-stats"><b>{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}}</b> articles &nbsp;·&nbsp; <b>{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Characters}}</b> characters &nbsp;·&nbsp; <b>26</b> books &nbsp;·&nbsp; every fact verified against the text</div>
</div>

<div class="wv-cards">
<div class="wv-card"><span class="wv-card-emblem">[[File:Emblem-travelers-gate.svg|44px|link=:Category:Traveler's Gate]]</span><div class="wv-card-title">[[House of Blades (novel)|The Traveler's Gate]]</div><div class="wv-card-sub">3 books</div>[[File:Cover-tg-01-house-of-blades.jpg|120px|link=House of Blades (novel)]]</div>
<div class="wv-card"><span class="wv-card-emblem">[[File:Emblem-elder-empire.svg|44px|link=:Category:Elder Empire]]</span><div class="wv-card-title">[[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|The Elder Empire]]</div><div class="wv-card-sub">6 books</div>[[File:Cover-ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow.jpg|120px|link=Of Sea and Shadow (novel)]]</div>
<div class="wv-card"><span class="wv-card-emblem">[[File:Emblem-cradle.svg|44px|link=:Category:Cradle]]</span><div class="wv-card-title">[[Unsouled (novel)|Cradle]]</div><div class="wv-card-sub">13 books</div>[[File:Cover-cradle-01-unsouled.jpg|120px|link=Unsouled (novel)]]</div>
<div class="wv-card"><span class="wv-card-emblem">[[File:Emblem-last-horizon.svg|44px|link=:Category:The Last Horizon]]</span><div class="wv-card-title">[[The Captain (novel)|The Last Horizon]]</div><div class="wv-card-sub">4 books</div>[[File:Cover-lh-01-the-captain.jpg|120px|link=The Captain (novel)]]</div>
</div>

<div class="wv-cols">
<div>

== Set your spoiler level ==
'''This wiki will not spoil you.''' Use the spoiler strip at the top of any article to set how
far you've read '''in each series independently'''. Every fact is tagged with the book that
reveals it; anything past your progress stays hidden — including infobox rows and category
labels. See [[Project:About]].

== Every fact is grounded ==
Seeded from the books themselves: each fact's supporting quote is verified '''verbatim''' in the
text, an independent judge confirms the quote supports the claim, and prose is original summary —
never copied, never invented. After seeding, editors own the wiki; the pipeline never overwrites
human edits.
</div>
<div>

== Explore ==
* '''Magic systems:''' [[Sacred Arts]] · [[Reading and the Soulbound]] · [[Traveling and the Territories]] · [[Spellcraft]]
* '''Browse:''' [[:Category:Characters|Characters]] · [[:Category:Locations|Locations]] · [[:Category:Groups|Groups]] · [[:Category:Lifeforms|Lifeforms]] · [[:Category:Culture|Culture]] · [[:Category:Timelines|Timelines]]
* '''By calling:''' [[:Category:Magic users|Magic users]] · [[:Category:Professions|Professions]] · [[:Category:Viewpoint characters|Viewpoint characters]]
* '''[[Willverse books]]''' — every book & reading order
* '''[[:Category:Content|The full category tree]]'''
</div>
</div>

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Meta]]
